@All Pings @Governance Pings @here

24 Hours Left to Nominate for the Star Atlas DAO Council

Hey everyone, Star Atlas DAO Council nominations close !

If you want a say in the future of Star Atlas, now’s your chance to step up and lead.

 | Nominate yourself here: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1YYW_Ur1ZwNkwRmnQ4iiy9lgx2r2XHrr5bO0H8wmEJQs/viewform?edit_requested=true
